a_record.description: The A record of the domain

aaaa_record.description: The AAAA record of the domain

complete.description: The status of the request to ping the domain

result.description: The result of the request to ping the domain

dns_provider.description: The DNS provider of the domain

dns_error.description: Indicates if there was an error retrieving DNS information

cluster_id.description: The cluster ID of the install

http_forwarded.description: The HTTP forwarded value of the domain

http_forwarded_list.description: The HTTP forwarded list of the domain

http_error.description: Indicates if there was an error retrieving HTTP information

atlas_env_id.description: Atlas environment ID associated with this domain

ns.description: The name servers of the domain

Pref.description: Priority of the mail server (lower values have higher priority)

soa.description: The start of authority records of the domain

hdr.description: Header of the start of authority record

ns.description: Primary name server for the zone

mbox.description: Email address of the zone administrator (@ replaced with .)

refresh.description: Time in seconds secondary servers wait before refreshing zone data

retry.description: Time in seconds to wait before retrying failed zone transfers

expire.description: Time in seconds zone data is valid without refreshing

minttl.description: Minimum time-to-live in seconds for negative responses

caa.description: The certification authority authorization records of the domain

hdr.description: Header of the start of authority record

flag.description: The flags for the CAA record

tag.description: The tag for the CAA record

value.description: The value for the CAA record

ip.description: The IP addresses of the domain

aname.description: The A name records of the domain

hdr.description: Header of the start of authority record

ssl.description: The SSL information of the domain

error.description: Error message if certificate validation failed

dns_names.description: DNS names included in the certificate

signature_algorithm.description: Signature algorithm identifier used in the certificate

sans.description: Subject Alternative Names in the certificate
